rumor.detail: GFA charged Camara & welfare officer over alleged referee assault (Mar 8 Karela match)

newIntel.reasoning: New disciplinary intel not in existing rumors. Date (Mar 10) after latest rumor (Apr 22 suspension). Distinct from prior misconduct suspension — this is GFA formal charge preceding the April disciplinary action.

rumor.detail: Chiefs agreed personal terms with Maxwele; deal awaits Golden Arrows approval

newIntel.reasoning: Date Jun 1, 2026 is after latest existing rumor (Jun 1 same-day report already in list). However, this source provides fresh confirmation of personal terms agreement — escalates from 'interested' to 'advanced' stage with concrete terms agreed.

rumor.detail: Mngqithi left Golden Arrows after season ended; now available for Chiefs role

newIntel.reasoning: Date Jun 2 is after latest rumor (May 29). Confirms Mngqithi's departure from Golden Arrows is official/imminent, opening pathway to Chiefs. New intel that contract formally ended and coach is now available, advancing the narrative beyond 'contact made' stage.

rumor.detail: Pirates intensify interest in 19yo midfielder amid multi-club tug-of-war for signature

newIntel.reasoning: Date May 25 is after latest rumor (May 31 Charleroi). Confirms Pirates escalated interest and formal competition vs Belgium/Egypt clubs. Provides broader picture of multi-club race beyond single-club updates already in list.

rumor.detail: Belgian club evaluating Cissé for Club NXT (development team) placement

newIntel.reasoning: Date May 31 is after latest Cissé rumor (May 31 Charleroi). New intel: Club Brugge actively evaluating player for development pathway, not just monitoring. Distinguishes from generic 'monitoring' previously reported.

needsReview.detail: Jun 1, 2026 report on personal terms agreement vs May 25, 2026 'advanced talks' rumor in existing list
